chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-3667 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For hearing of main case. 11.02.2025 Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri Assistant A.G. Sindh. None present for the petitioner. There is no intimation. This petition is pending since 2017 and it was lastly fixed on 12.04.2018 when Syed Muhammad Waseem Shah advocate held brief on behalf of petitioner’s counsel, who was busy at Circuit Court Larkana. Thereafter no efforts have been made to fix the matter in Court. Under the circumstances, it reflects that petitioner is not interested to proceed further. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
